KAREN_PROMISE_PILE_POWER.title: Promise
KAREN_PROMISE_PILE_POWER.description: There are {Amount} card(s) in the Promise pile.
KAREN_PROMISE_PILE_POWER.voidDescription: I am now the emptiest person in the world.
KAREN_STAR_FRIEND_POWER.title: Star Friendship
KAREN_STAR_FRIEND_POWER.description: The stars have woven our friendship. Gain extra rewards when killing enemies.
KAREN_LETTER_POWER.title: Letter
KAREN_LETTER_POWER.description: Whenever you put a card into the Promise Pile, gain {Block:diff()} Block.
KAREN_STARLIGHT_POWER.title: Starlight
KAREN_STARLIGHT_POWER.description: Whenever you play a Shine card, play it {Repeat:diff()} more time(s), then deplete its Shine.
KAREN_STARLIGHT03_POWER.title: Starlight
KAREN_AQUARIUM_POWER.title: Aquarium
KAREN_AQUARIUM_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card, then put 1 card from your hand into the [gold]Promise Pile[/gold].
